name: jihan-agents
description: Claude Code distribution for Jihan Agent Source.

plugins.name: jihan-agents
plugins.description: Role-based agent suite for documentation lifecycle. Bundles 5 role agents (notion-writer, verifier-on-sandbox, notion-doc-verifier, notion-verifier-gui, notion-verifier-concept) and 2 skills (general-doc-rules, method-doc-rules) for authoring, verifying, and QAing Notion how-to documents end to end.
